description: Manages the creation, tracking, and resolution of work items triggered by evaluation results, review findings, and lifecycle events. Work items are the primary mechanism for surfacing required human action.
forbidden_responsibilities: Running evaluations — that belongs to control_plane.evaluation
Defining artifact models — those are owned by shared.artifact_models
Defining identifier schemes — those are owned by shared.ids
Workflow orchestration — that belongs to orchestration.pipeline
Storing domain-specific data — that belongs to the relevant domain_module
